ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address for the order */,
  "order_source" TEXT /* Source of the order (e.g., web, mobile app, phone) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual delivery date */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of any returns (e.g., none, requested, approved, returned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in an order */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price_each" TEXT /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax" TEXT /* Tax amount for the item */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Shipping cost for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., 10x10x10 cm) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which reordering should be initiated */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock reaches the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was created */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, customer service, data analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view orders, manage inventory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
